title: Mo-Max's Better Copper Armor
description:
Adds Better Copper Armor To the game.
When Hit by lightning gain special effects.
By -Mo_Max
body:
![Title image that says Better Copper Armor by Momax in Minecraft Font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HV2lVKu1/images/88c6fa52b1aa6595dd0ce29a9417b96910cb13e5.png)


# **Adds Better Copper Armor To the game.**

### When Hit by lightning gain:

Full Hunger

Full Saturation

1 to 10 XP levels

See gallery for crafting.

##### By -Mo_Max
  
*Its my first mod.*
